subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the verses of God! Thy letter was noted, and its contents, replete with spiritual meanings, were perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن بایات الله مسطورات آنجناب ملحوظ گشت و مضمون مشحون بمعانی پر روح و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant
